title: strophanthus glabriflorus
intro: Strophanthus glabriflorus, also known as the smooth-flowered strophanthus, is a plant species in the family Apocynaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its cardiac glycosides, which are compounds that can regulate heart rhythm and improve heart function. The health benefits of Strophanthus glabriflorus include its potential to treat conditions such as hypertension, heart failure, and arrhythmia, as well as its use as a diuretic to reduce fluid retention. Herbal preparations of Strophanthus glabriflorus can be made into infusions, tinctures, or extracts, which can be taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
